headline: Deutsche Bank Maintains Buy on Welltower, Raises Price Target to $265
summary: Deutsche Bank  analyst Omotayo Okusanya   maintains Welltower (NYSE:WELL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $215 to $265.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Welltower, Raises Price Target to $236
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Welltower (NYSE:WELL) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $233 to $236.
